'''鈭歯g-d-r-sh''' ('''kangadreshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imburden|imburden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imburden|imburden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-d-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangadreshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadreshoko|thingadreshoko]] || [[word:jingadreshoko|jingadreshoko]] || [[word:shingadreshoko|shingadreshoko]] || [[word:kingadreshoko|kingadreshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadreshoko|thongadreshoko]] || [[word:jongadreshoko|jongadreshoko]] || [[word:shongadreshoko|shongadreshoko]] || [[word:kongadreshoko|kongadreshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngadreshoko|th忙ngadreshoko]] || [[word:j忙ngadreshoko|j忙ngadreshoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngadreshoko|sh忙ngadreshoko]] || [[word:k忙ngadreshoko|k忙ngadreshoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangadreshoko|thangadreshoko]] || [[word:jangadreshoko|jangadreshoko]] || [[word:shangadreshoko|shangadreshoko]] || [[word:kangadreshoko|kangadreshoko]]
|}
